creator: obrien@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Superceeded by PR 21632. 
Also, I will not patch client/scripts/freebsd in the future.  The correct way 
is to get the ISC DHCP author to fix the offical script on his end. 
This is just how we work -- desired chagnes must be sent back to the original 
author, as it is stupid to continue to patch it on our end if we can get 
the original author to make the change/fix on his end once and for all.
